labels.name: Alice/P0
labels.purpose: Requires same-day response — high urgency, high stakes
auto_rules: Keywords: 'urgent', 'ASAP', 'today', 'blocking', 'P0' in subject or body
Emails from VIP contacts (investors, board, key customers) with an explicit ask
Any thread where Alice detects a hard deadline within 24 hours
Escalation replies where a prior email has gone unanswered 48h+

labels.name: Alice/P1
auto_rules: Keywords: 'by end of week', 'by tomorrow', 'please respond', 'following up'
Emails from partners, customers, or leads with an explicit question or request
Contract or proposal threads awaiting a decision
Calendar invites or scheduling requests that need acceptance/decline

labels.name: Alice/P2
auto_rules: Emails with a soft deadline or FYI ask that still require a reply
Intro emails, referrals, and inbound partnership inquiries
Vendor or tool renewal notices with action required
Internal team threads where a decision or acknowledgment is pending

labels.name: Alice/P3
labels.purpose: Low priority — informational or no explicit action required
auto_rules: Newsletters, digest emails, and product updates
CC/BCC'd threads where the sender is informing, not asking
Read receipts, auto-replies, and confirmation emails
Threads where all action items belong to other parties

labels.name: Alice/Ball-With-Us
labels.purpose: Waiting on us to respond or act — we own the next move
auto_rules: Emails with a direct question addressed to the inbox owner
Threads where the last reply was from the external party
Any thread Alice drafted a response for but it hasn't been sent
Action items assigned to the inbox owner identified by Alice

labels.name: Alice/Ball-With-Them
labels.purpose: Waiting on the other party — they own the next move
auto_rules: Threads where the last reply is from the inbox owner
Emails where Alice detects a pending deliverable from the recipient
Proposals or documents sent, awaiting feedback or sign-off
Intro emails sent, awaiting a response from the recipient

labels.name: Alice/Stale
labels.purpose: No response or action in 7+ days — needs review or close-out
auto_rules: Any P0 or P1 thread with no activity for 7+ days
Ball-With-Them threads with no reply in 7+ days
Ball-With-Us threads that were not acted on within SLA
Open commitments from email threads where the deadline has passed

labels.name: Alice/Draft-Ready
labels.purpose: Alice has prepared a draft response — awaiting human review and approval
auto_rules: Applied automatically by Alice when a draft is written and staged
P0/P1 threads where Alice has generated a suggested reply
Removed automatically when the draft is sent or discarded

labels.name: Alice/Triaged
labels.purpose: Processed by Alice — no action needed, safe to archive
auto_rules: Emails fully handled: response sent, task created, or decision logged
P3 emails Alice determined require no action after analysis
Auto-applied after Alice marks a thread as resolved in its queue
Applied to threads the human owner has explicitly dismissed
